hotels.name: Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

stops.title: Halong Bay Day Trip — Omkara Cruise (Shared, 35-Seater Coach)
stops.description: A full day on Halong Bay aboard the Omkara Cruise with Indian lunch. Covers Surprising Cave, Titop Island, and kayaking. Guide-accompanied group transfer.

stops.title: Arrival Transfer — Private
stops.drop: Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

stops.title: Two-Way Transfer — Private (River Rafting & Zipline)
stops.pickup: Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills
stops.remarks: Round trip to Hoa Phu Thanh for rafting and zipline. Private transfers both ways.

stops.title: VinWonders Phu Quoc + Vinpearl Safari — Entry Tickets (Private Transfer)
stops.remarks: After the visit, guests are dropped back at the hotel. No tour guide.
stops.description: A full day across two of Phu Quoc's marquee attractions. VinWonders is Vietnam's largest theme park — rides, shows, water zones and a fantasy-castle centrepiece. Vinpearl Safari is a semi-wild sanctuary with tigers, lions, giraffes and rare Asian species across walking and driving zones.

stops.title: 4-Island Tour by Sharing Speedboat + Cable Car with Local Lunch
stops.description: Speedboat cruise to Gam Ghi, May Rut, Buom and Thom islands with time on each for snorkelling and swimming. The Hon Thom cable car — one of the world's longest sea-crossings — is included.

stops.title: Full-Day Ho Chi Minh City Tour + Cu Chi Tunnels — Private
stops.remarks: Guests are dropped back at the hotel after the tour.
stops.description: A full-day sweep of Ho Chi Minh City and the Cu Chi Tunnels. Reunification Palace, Notre Dame Cathedral, the War Remnants Museum, and the tunnel network used during the Vietnam War.

stops.title: Local Lunch During Tour (Tickets Only)
stops.description: A traditional Vietnamese lunch included as part of the day's tour.

terms: Transfers on the day of departure are as per the itinerary; onward day-use transfers are the guest's responsibility.
No refund will be issued for unutilised services.
Bed type is subject to availability at check-in.
A No-Show is treated as a 100% cancellation. Please be present at the pickup point on time.
Compulsory tipping in Vietnam: USD 3 per person per day (USD 1 for driver, USD 2 for guide). Paid on the ground.
Ticket pricing in Vietnam is based on the height of the guest: below 100 cm — free; 100–140 cm — child ticket; above 140 cm — adult ticket.
Some hotels may collect a refundable security deposit at check-in against incidentals.
Standard room availability is from 14:00 on arrival day until 12:00 on departure day. Early check-in / late check-out is subject to hotel availability and may incur a supplement.
Check-in / check-out timings and room sizes vary by hotel. Please refer to the hotel's own policy where relevant.
A driver surcharge applies for pickup/drop-off scheduled between 23:00 and 07:00.
ATMs across Vietnam widely accept Visa and Mastercard; Cirrus/Maestro is less common.
For visits to religious sites, dress modestly and follow local conventions.
A universal adapter or 3-pin plug is recommended.
SIC (shared) transfers are subject to +/- 30 min variance. The coach waits a maximum of 5 minutes at pickup.
Private transfer maximum wait time is 20 minutes; beyond this the transfer is treated as a No-Show.
Refunds cannot be processed for services already utilised.
The driver will carry all the sightseeing tickets included in your package.
Any additional charges levied by hotels (gala dinners, festive surcharges, resort fees) are the guest's responsibility and are payable directly at the hotel.
Activities scheduled on 25th, 30th, 31st Dec and 1st Jan are subject to operational feasibility and local regulations.

Passengers arriving at Tan Son Nhat International Airport (Ho Chi Minh City) must complete Vietnam's pre-arrival immigration form at prearrival.immigration.gov.vn before departure and present the QR code on arrival.
